class.name: ImportExporter
class.brief_description: Export imported resources back to their original source formats.

method.name: export_imports
method.description: Exports imported resources to [param p_out_dir]. If [param files_to_export] is non-empty, only the listed [code]res://[/code]-rooted resource paths are exported; otherwise every importable resource in the loaded project is exported. Returns [code]OK[/code] on success. Retrieve a per-file summary with [method get_report].

method.name: get_report
method.description: Returns the [ImportExporterReport] describing the results of the most recent [method export_imports] call, including counts of successful exports, failed exports, and resources that could not be converted.

method.name: reset
method.description: Resets the exporter state, clearing any cached report data. Call this before reusing the same [ImportExporter] instance for a new export session.

method.name: test_exported_project
method.description: Re-imports the files produced by the most recent [method export_imports] call and compares them against the originals in [param p_original_project_dir] (a directory or a [code].zip[/code] archive of the original project). The comparison results are stored on [method get_report]; inspect its [code]failed_tests[/code] field to see which files diverged. If [param p_original_project_dir] is empty, the tests run without a comparison baseline and only sanity-check that the exported files can be re-imported. [b]Note:[/b] the return value reflects only catastrophic errors (e.g. the export has not been run, no pack is loaded). It returns [code]OK[/code] even when individual file comparisons fail; always inspect the report for per-file results.
